回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文寫作(三) (English Writing III)	開課班級 : 應英二年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 洪淑敏	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
The main objective of this course is to help students build writing skills and develop vocabularies necessary for writing essays and research papers. This semester will focus on the genre of life writing. 


2.教學綱要
1.Practices the reading skills required to understand academic texts as well as the vocabulary needed to comprehend the text itself.
2. Practices the vocabulary and grammar from the readings in preparation for the writing task.
3. Presents and practices the grammatical structures and features needed for the writing task. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : College Writing Skills　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : John Langan　出版社 : 　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
writing 60% participation 10% midterm and final exam 30% 
Every composition task should be completed before due day. (No matter in class writing or take home work). If you are not able to come to the class and miss the writing task, the score would be deducted without proper reason.
